summary: The diff implements all three requirements substantially. REQ-50 (remove black/near-black colours) is addressed via warm OKLCH palette replacements in index.css, tailwind.config.js, and all component/page files. REQ-51 (warm brown/skin-tone palette redesign) is applied consistently across header, footer, nav pills, cards, buttons, badges, modals, dot-grid, and all pages. REQ-52 (SparkParticles even distribution + warm colours) is implemented with a stratified 4x4 grid layout and warm brown/peach pill colours. One minor concern: the dark-mode .dark block in index.css still uses OKLCH lightness values around 0.22-0.26, which are very dark though not pure black.

missing_requirements.requirement: Dark-mode CSS rules that produce black surfaces are removed or overridden
missing_requirements.reason: The .dark block in frontend/src/index.css still defines --background at oklch(0.22 0.025 55), which is a very dark surface (lightness 22%). While not pure black, it is close to the near-black threshold and the AC states dark-mode rules producing black surfaces should be removed or overridden.
